title: Ultra Soft Hooded Baby Towel - Absorbent 6-Layer Muslin Baby Bath Towel for Newborns - Cozy and Gentle Hooded Wrap for Delicate Skin, 90x90cm (blue)
features: 【KEEPS YOUR BABY WARM】This hooded baby towel is designed to prevent heat loss from the head, keeping your baby warm and cozy. Whether after a bath, at the pool, or on the beach, it provides a comfortable wrap, giving your baby a sense of security.

【SOFT & SKIN-FRIENDLY ORGANIC COTTON】Made from organic cotton, this baby bath towel is gentle on delicate skin, hypoallergenic, and perfect for babies with sensitive skin. The 6-layer muslin design offers an ultra-soft touch, ensuring a safe and soothing experience.

【SUPERIOR ABSORBENCY & QUICK DRYING】Thicker and more absorbent than regular towels, this baby hooded towel quickly absorbs moisture, keeping your baby dry and warm after a bath while reducing the risk of catching a cold. It also dries fast, preventing bacteria buildup.

【VERSATILE & MULTI-PURPOSE】More than just a baby towel, it can be used as a wrap, blanket, or cover-up—ideal for use in the bathroom, swimming pool, or beach. The large 90x90cm size also makes it a perfect baby blanket for warmth on the go.

【PERFECT GIFT FOR NEWBORNS】Made of high-quality, durable muslin fabric, this baby bath towel is machine washable, resistant to shedding, and remains soft even after multiple washes. Suitable for newborns to toddlers, it is a practical and thoughtful gift for new parents, ensuring warmth and comfort for their little one.
